fields.Front: I will buy a luxury car next month
fields.Back: Aku akan membeli mobil mewah bulan depan

fields.Front: That hotel is already famous because of its star-rated restaurant
fields.Back: Hotel itu sudah terkenal karena restorannya berbintang

fields.Front: I will send an important message tonight
fields.Back: Aku akan mengirim pesan penting nanti malam

fields.Front: Have you shared the link to that article?
fields.Back: Apakah kamu sudah membagikan tautan artikel itu?

fields.Front: I always want to share knowledge with friends
fields.Back: Aku selalu ingin bagi ilmu dengan teman-teman

fields.Front: I haven’t finished writing that document for the meeting
fields.Back: Aku belum selesai menulis dok itu untuk rapat

fields.Front: I will add a new friend to this group
fields.Back: Aku akan tambah teman baru di grup ini

fields.Front: I am searching for the answer to this difficult question
fields.Back: Aku sedang cari jawaban untuk soal sulit ini

fields.Front: We have already joined that online discussion group
fields.Back: Kami sudah bergabung di grup diskusi online itu

fields.Front: Every member of the club must attend next week
fields.Back: Setiap anggota klub harus hadir minggu depan

fields.Front: I haven’t received the latest information about that event
fields.Back: Aku belum mendapatkan info terbaru tentang acara itu

fields.Front: That hotel is not very luxurious now
fields.Back: Hotel itu tidak terlalu mewah sekarang

fields.Front: This road is too wide for a village
fields.Back: Jalan ini terlalu lebar untuk desa

fields.Front: I will look for another solution tomorrow
fields.Back: Aku akan mencari solusi lain besok

fields.Front: Why haven't you seen the others?
fields.Back: Kenapa kamu belum melihat lainnya?

fields.Front: This taste is not a usual combination
fields.Back: Rasa ini bukan gabungan yang biasa

fields.Front: I have never seen an ocean this vast
fields.Back: Aku belum pernah melihat lautan seluas ini

fields.Front: Is that river still flowing strongly?
fields.Back: Apakah sungai itu masih mengalir deras?

fields.Front: I should have left earlier
fields.Back: Aku harusnya sudah berangkat lebih awal

fields.Front: The doctor is examining a patient inside
fields.Back: Dokter sedang periksa pasien di dalam

fields.Front: My internet connection has not been stable since earlier
fields.Back: Koneksi internetku belum stabil sejak tadi

fields.Front: Have you received the message?
fields.Back: Apakah Anda sudah menerima pesannya?

fields.Front: Please connect that cable to the computer
fields.Back: Tolong sambungkan kabel itu ke komputer

fields.Front: I always open the homepage every morning
fields.Back: Aku selalu membuka beranda setiap pagi

fields.Front: I don’t want to wait anymore
fields.Back: Aku tidak ingin menunggu lagi

fields.Front: He no longer works here
fields.Back: Dia tidak bekerja di sini lagi

fields.Front: I am busy right now, don’t disturb me
fields.Back: Aku sedang sibuk sekarang, jangan ganggu

fields.Front: This book has a glossary at the end
fields.Back: Buku ini memiliki glosarium di akhir

fields.Front: That hatred will only hurt yourself
fields.Back: Kebencian itu hanya akan menyakiti diri sendiri

fields.Front: I really hate the heavy rain today
fields.Back: Aku benar-benar benci hujan deras hari ini

fields.Front: The sadness was clearly visible in his eyes
fields.Back: Kesedihan itu terlihat jelas di matanya

fields.Front: I still feel pain after falling earlier
fields.Back: Aku masih merasa sakit setelah jatuh tadi

fields.Front: Shit, I forgot to do that assignment
fields.Back: Brengsek, aku lupa mengerjakan tugas itu

fields.Front: The child was almost drowning in the swimming pool
fields.Back: Anak itu hampir tenggelam di kolam renang

fields.Front: The journey will continue onwards from here
fields.Back: Perjalanan akan terus ke depan dari sini

fields.Front: These instructions are very straightforward and easy to follow
fields.Back: Instruksi ini sangat langsung dan mudah diikuti

fields.Front: We must move forward even though the road is difficult
fields.Back: Kita harus maju meski jalannya sulit

fields.Front: I chose a simple house design
fields.Back: Aku memilih desain rumah yang sederhana

fields.Front: I have to choose between those two offers
fields.Back: Aku harus pilih antara dua tawaran itu

fields.Front: Don’t walk backwards on that staircase
fields.Back: Jangan berjalan mundur di tangga itu
